news.title:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.
news.summary:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.

news.title:
Jefferies cuts price targets for IndiGo, IHCL, ITC Hotels amid US-Iran war, citing rising fuel, weaker tourism.
Airports like GMR fare better with diversified revenues; domestic travel cushions hotel sector impacts.
news.summary:

news.title:
Brokerages target ICICI Bank, Hindalco, Godrej Consumer, DMart, IndiGo; offer sector insights.

news.title:
India's domestic air passenger traffic may grow only 3% in FY26.
Growth slows despite the sector expanding over 50% in two of last four years.
news.summary:
India's domestic air passenger traffic may grow only 3% in FY26.

news.title:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.
news.summary:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.

news.title:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.
news.summary:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
Emkay Global cuts InterGlobe Aviation's FY26-28 EPS by 7-28% and reduces target price to Rs 5,500.
IndiGo revises domestic fuel surcharges to Rs275-950, international surcharges rise significantly to Rs900-10,000.
news.summary:
Emkay Global cuts InterGlobe Aviation's FY26-28 EPS by 7-28% and reduces target price to Rs 5,500.
IndiGo revises domestic fuel surcharges to Rs275-950, international surcharges rise significantly to Rs900-10,000.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment for Nxtra Data, boosting its data center business. Adani Ports surpasses 500M tonnes of cargo handled, enhancing investor confidence.
